items.title: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
items.dek: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 589 people.
items.body: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 589 people.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified documents
items.dek: Bolton faces a prison sentence of up to five years and has agreed to pay $2.25m in fine, prosecutors say.
items.body: Bolton faces a prison sentence of up to five years and has agreed to pay $2.25m in fine, prosecutors say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Four men held over child marriage in Sierra Leone appear in landmark court case
items.dek: It relates to a 17-year-old girl - four men including her father and husband face years in jail if convicted.
items.body: It relates to a 17-year-old girl - four men including her father and husband face years in jail if convicted.
items.author: IriLine Desk
